nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Anneford was born in 1236, in Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Alice De Rushalle. He died in 1272, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Anneford est né en 1236, à Rowley Regis, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alice De Rushalle. Il est décédé en 1272, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Annefordは1236年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアロウリー レジスで生まれた。彼はAlice De Rushalleとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1272年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Anneford(은)는 1236년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 로우리 레지스에서 태어났다. 그는 Alice De Rushalle(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Anneford родился в 1236 г. в местности роули регис, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alice De Rushalle. Он умер в 1272 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.
